# Nexus Mortgage SG — llms.txt
# AI-readable summary for language models crawling this site

Nexus Mortgage SG is an independent Singapore mortgage broker specialising in
HDB loans, private property mortgages, refinancing, equity / cash-out loans,
commercial property financing, and estate planning. We compare rates across
16 major banks. Our service is free to borrowers — banks pay a referral fee
on successful disbursement.

Advisor: Dan Ler
Phone: +65 8752 0859
WhatsApp: https://wa.me/6587520859
Office: 39A Jalan Pemimpin #06-02B, Halcyon 1, Singapore 577183
Hours: Mon–Sat, 9am–7pm SGT
Languages: English, 中文 (Mandarin)

## Key Pages
- Home & Mortgage Calculator: https://nexusmortgage.sg/
- All Services Overview: https://nexusmortgage.sg/services/
- About Nexus: https://nexusmortgage.sg/about/
- Contact: https://nexusmortgage.sg/contact/
- Current Mortgage Rates: https://nexusmortgage.sg/mortgage-rates/
- Affordability Calculator: https://nexusmortgage.sg/affordability/
- Refinance Savings Calculator: https://nexusmortgage.sg/refinance-calculator/
- Equity / Cash-Out Loan: https://nexusmortgage.sg/equity-loan/
- Insights Hub: https://nexusmortgage.sg/blog/

## Services
1. Residential home loan (HDB, EC, condo, landed) — 16-bank comparison
2. New property loan with In-Principle Approval before OTP
3. Home loan refinancing (SORA, fixed, repricing)
4. Cash-out refinance up to 75% LTV (private/commercial only)
5. Equity term loan up to 55% LTV on fully-paid property
6. Commercial property financing (shophouse, industrial, office)
7. Property estate planning (decoupling, ABSD, legacy)
8. Pre-purchase TDSR/MSR check with optional soft IPA

- MAS 4% Stress Test Guide (2026): https://nexusmortgage.sg/blog/blog-mas-stress-test-2026.html

- Using CPF OA for Private Property: https://nexusmortgage.sg/blog/blog-cpf-oa-hdb-guide.html

- Singapore Home Loan Rates (2026): https://nexusmortgage.sg/blog/blog-home-loan-rates-singapore.html
- Best Home Loan for Condo & Private Property (2026): https://nexusmortgage.sg/blog/blog-best-home-loan-first-time-buyer.html
- Decoupling Private Property in Singapore: https://nexusmortgage.sg/blog/blog-decoupling-private-property-singapore.html

## Key Facts
- TDSR cap: 55% of gross monthly income (all property types)
- MSR cap: 30% of gross monthly income (HDB flats and ECs only)
- MAS stress-test floor rate: 4% p.a.
- Max LTV (first private property, no outstanding loans): 75%
- Max LTV (cash-out refinance, with mortgage): 75% combined
- Max LTV (equity term loan, fully paid): 55%
- Max tenure: 30 years or (75 minus borrower's age), whichever is shorter
- HDB flats are NOT eligible for cash-out or equity term loans
- Service area: Singapore only
- Broker fee to borrower: S$0
